title: stelis soratana
intro: Stelis soratana, also known as the orchid, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Orchidaceae. The medicinal properties of Stelis soratana include its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antibacterial properties, which are attributed to its flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of this plant are numerous, including its ability to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and boost the immune system. Stelis soratana can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, including fever, sore throats, and respiratory issues.
